blockers.title: 批量配方可见显式编辑入口
blockers.dependency: External Batch client / IE ActiveX / WebSocket push path
recheckCommands: manual: provision external Batch client, trigger WebSocket push to batchFormulaEdit, then run a marker save/submit and query rm_formulas/rm_formula_processes/rm_process_actives
passCriteria: A real user-visible or external-client driven edit entry opens batchFormulaEdit without adding a fake platform-only button.
The edit/save/submit action uses a unique ADP_E2E marker.
PostgreSQL proves the marker write in rm_formulas and related batch formula process/activity tables.
nextActions: Connect the external Batch client/server path described by the product documentation.
Capture WebSocket/browser/API evidence for the real edit flow.
Promote the case to PASS only after marker persistence is proven.
nonSolutions: Do not add a fake list button that bypasses the vendor Batch client workflow.
Do not mark PASS from batch/sync import evidence alone; that is covered by a separate accepted case.

blockers.title: QCS 不良数和库存/入库相关回写
blockers.dependency: material service package plus product confirmation for any standalone bad-quantity entry
recheckCommands: manual: after material service deployment, run checkProdResult/generateProduceOutSing with marker inventory data and query material stock-in/inventory tables
passCriteria: material service has at least one healthy Nacos prod instance.
Authenticated material checkProdResult and generateProduceOutSing endpoints return HTTP 2xx and no longer return tenant-service 503.
A marker flow proves inventory/stock-in target table writes in PostgreSQL.
If standalone bad quantity is required, a product package or manual identifies the field, route, and target table before acceptance.
nextActions: Deploy the material warehouse/inventory service package or map the correct serviceName.
Only reopen standalone bad-quantity acceptance if a later business package or product manual supplies the missing route/table.
nonSolutions: Do not treat accepted QCS qualified/unqualified WOM state backfill as inventory stock-in proof.
Do not invent a bad-quantity database column when the recovered package has no route/table mapping.

blockers.title: 批次、物料、工单追溯查询
blockers.dependency: ProcessAnalysis / Traceability service package, runtime metadata, menu, permissions, and PostgreSQL schema
recheckCommands: manual: after ProcessAnalysis deployment, open isProdprocessView/processBatchViewOut from the real WOM trace button with a marker batch
passCriteria: ProcessAnalysis or traceability service has at least one healthy Nacos prod instance.
ProcessAnalysis runtime_view/menu/table counts are non-zero and mapped to the deployed module.
Authenticated traceability endpoints return HTTP 2xx successful responses instead of 503.
The real WOM trace button opens processBatchViewOut and any target query tables are verified in PostgreSQL.
nextActions: Recover or deploy the ProcessAnalysis module package.
Apply module runtime views, menus, permissions, and PostgreSQL tables.
Run marker browser/API/DB acceptance before changing PROD-020 to PASS.
nonSolutions: Do not patch WOM alone and call traceability done; the target module is absent.
Do not use a direct URL smoke without ProcessAnalysis service registration and DB evidence.

blockers.title: 完整工序报工、产量、不良数登记
blockers.dependency: material service package plus product confirmation for standalone bad-quantity entry
recheckCommands: manual: rerun accepted WOM report-work marker flows, then add inventory/material marker acceptance once material service is available
passCriteria: Accepted report-work subflows remain green: process start/end, activity start/end, output detail, input detail, easy activity, and check activity.
The material/inventory service path is available and marker stock-in or inventory write-back is proven.
If product requires standalone bad quantity, the dedicated field/route/table is recovered and marker-tested.
nextActions: Keep existing report-work PASS evidence as regression coverage.
Complete material service acceptance for the inventory boundary.
Only add a standalone bad-quantity case after product/package evidence exists.
nonSolutions: Do not infer inventory write-back from wom_check_records or QCS state backfill.
Do not force wom_mat_consum_recods rows with a database trigger for the current manual-putin path.

blockers.title: 完工入库或库存回写
blockers.dependency: material warehouse/inventory service package and target stock-in table map
recheckCommands: manual: after material service deployment, run checkProdResult/generateProduceOutSing marker flows and query material stock/inbound tables
passCriteria: serviceName=material or the confirmed warehouse service has healthy Nacos prod instances.
checkProdResult and generateProduceOutSing return HTTP 2xx and no longer return 503.
Controller/service/DAO/SQL path is traced.
PostgreSQL target inventory or stock-in tables show marker writes.
nextActions: Deploy and register the material warehouse/inventory package.
Run marker stock-in/inventory acceptance before changing PROD-022 to PASS.
nonSolutions: Do not treat BaseSet material master data or WOM internal material tables as the material-service stock-in target.
Do not mark PASS from HTTP 200 alone without database write proof.

blockers.title: 生产相关列表导出
blockers.dependency: Product decision and backend data-export implementation for production list pages
recheckCommands: manual: after export button/backend implementation is recovered, capture browser file response, filename, size, and workbook sample
passCriteria: Product owner confirms which production lists must support data export.
Runtime button/menu metadata exposes an export action for each required list.
Target source/runtime sourceAudit finds exportExcel/excelExport/导出 hooks for each required list.
Backend export endpoints return non-empty files with list data, not empty template-download placeholders.
PostgreSQL persistence is NOT_APPLICABLE for file export; acceptance evidence must instead prove the browser file response and sample workbook content.
Browser network evidence captures filename, response status, size, and sample workbook content.
nextActions: Confirm export scope with product owner.
Recover or implement data-export service methods and runtime buttons for required lists; current public browser ingress already proves page reachability for all 6 target lists.
Run real browser file-response and sourceAudit acceptance before changing PROD-023 to PASS.
nonSolutions: Do not accept empty HTTP 200 downloadXls responses as data export.
Do not confuse import-template download with list-data export.
